title: Whitham, Elena - Minister for Drugs and Alcohol Policy - ACOBA advice
body: "Elena Whitham MSP left her role as Minister for Drugs and Alcohol Policy at the Scottish Government in February 2024  Co-Optee, Shelter  Ms Whitham sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with Shelter. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in June 2025 and the appointment was announced in August 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Simon Community Scotland  Ms Whitham sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with the Simon Community Scotland. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in June 2024 and the appointment was taken up in October 2024. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
